goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and 'doesn't need to include internet'.
The hotel should be in the 'south'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'london kings cross'.
The train should 'arrive by 08:00' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and doesn't need to include internet
The hotel should be in the south
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to london kings cross
The train should arrive by 08:00 and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
